hero.headline: Global events without barriers
hero.intro: Discover concerts, festivals, sport, theatre and other experiences from around the world in one clear place.
hero.partner-note: For partners: We are building a network across ticketing, culture, sport, travel and experiences.
hero.imageAlt: Illustration: global events connected with Czech and Slovak fans.
section-events-subtitle: Discover concerts, festivals, sporting events and other experiences from around the world.
feature1-desc: We guide you to trusted partners and official sales channels.
feature2-desc: AJSEE is built to make discovering global events clear and accessible across languages.
feature3-desc: We help you find events and experiences worth travelling for.
partners-cta: I want to become a partner

contact-legal-note: By submitting the form, you acknowledge our Privacy Policy and Cookies Policy.
about-text: AJSEE® was born from the need to travel for culture without stress or unnecessary barriers. We’re building a platform that opens the door to concerts, festivals, theatre and sport — at home and abroad.
about-title: About AJSEE | Global events without language barriers
about-hero-text: Experiences have no borders. And that’s exactly why AJSEE was born.
about-hero-subtext: Our goal is to make cultural, entertainment and sporting events from around the world easier to discover — clearly, intuitively and without unnecessary barriers when exploring events, tickets and travel options.
about-hero-claim: AJSEE<sup>®</sup> is a modern platform for everyone who wants to experience the world — without unnecessary barriers.
about-value-1: Openness – We make global experiences accessible to more people.
about-value-3: Innovation – We follow trends, curate strong events and build with technology.
about-story-p1: It was autumn 2024. We were sitting in a pub, had a beer — and as it often happens, an ordinary chat sparked something that soon turned into a real idea.
about-story-p2: That very evening, the name AJSEE was born, along with the first logo draft and a vision: to make global experiences easier to access without language barriers.
about-story-p3: But then came the hardest phase: to actually start.
about-story-p4: We both had full-time jobs, lived 180 kilometres apart, and time was scarce. The project paused for a while before it really took off.
about-story-p5: Then one day, one of us simply launched it. Without a perfect plan, but with the certainty that it made sense.
about-story-p6: And that’s when AJSEE started becoming reality.
about-future-p1: In 2026, we are expanding the content, partnerships and technical foundation of the platform.
about-future-p2: We are developing language versions, practical guides and partnerships with international platforms.
about-future-p3: Step by step, we want to expand the selection of events, related services and accessibility for a wider audience.
about-future-p4: We want AJSEE to become a first-choice starting point for anyone looking for global experiences — whether in London, Barcelona or closer to home.
event-demo-badge: New: accommodation with TrustedStays – planning a trip to the UK for a live experience? For selected events, we can connect you with accommodation options.
events-page-title: Events and tickets for concerts, festivals and sport | AJSEE
events-hero-title: Concerts, festivals and sport in one place
events-hero-desc: Discover concerts, festivals, theatre, sporting events and other experiences in one clear catalogue.
events-load-error: Events could not be loaded. Please try again later.
thankyou-title: Thank you for your message | AJSEE
thankyou-message:
Your message has been sent.
We will get back to you soon.
about-timeline-2024: The first ideas for creating the AJSEE® platform. The vision to connect the world of culture and experiences without language barriers is born.
about-timeline-2025: Start of programming and development of the multilingual AJSEE® website.
about-timeline-2025-07-01: The first public version of the AJSEE® website goes live. The website opens to visitors and we gradually expand the content, features and partnership opportunities.
about-team-adam-claim: Adam Brázda is the person behind AJSEE®. From the first ideas to the website launch, he leads the project with the vision to connect the world of culture and experiences without barriers.
about-team-jan-claim: From day one, Jan has shared the vision of making culture and experiences more accessible — with a focus on clarity and user experience.
about-cta-headline: Want to be part of it?
about-cta-text: AJSEE® is open to collaboration, ideas and new partnerships. If our mission has caught your interest, write to us – we look forward to hearing from you!
footer-company-info: AJSEE® is operated by AJSEE LTD, registered in England and Wales under company number 17105762. Registered office: 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ.
blog-title: Blog about concerts, festivals and experience travel | AJSEE
blog-lead: Read tips, guides and reviews for concerts, festivals, sporting events and experience-led travel.
blog-meta-description: Read tips, guides and reviews for concerts, festivals, sporting events and experience-led travel.
faq-title: Frequently asked questions about AJSEE, tickets and event travel
faq-a1: AJSEE is a modern discovery platform for concerts, festivals, sport, culture, tickets and experience-led travel.
faq-q2: How many languages does AJSEE support?
faq-a2: AJSEE is localised into 6 languages: Czech, English, German, Slovak, Polish and Hungarian.
faq-a3: Browsing and discovering events on AJSEE is free. Ticket purchases or service bookings are completed with the relevant partners.
faq-q4: How can I become an AJSEE partner?
faq-a4: Just fill out the form on the Partners page and we will contact you with the next steps.

cookie-banner.desc: We use necessary cookies for the website to function and, with your consent, analytics cookies that help us measure traffic and improve AJSEE.cz.
cookie-banner.necessaryText: These cookies are required for the basic functioning of the website.
cookie-banner.analyticsText: They help us measure traffic and improve the website using Google Analytics.
